# vector: status_push
# STATUS_PUSH: firmware-initiated 4 Hz status frame with STATUS_RESP payload layout
# raw  = frame before COBS (ver|type|flags|seq|len|payload|crc32c, all LE)
# wire = COBS(raw) + 0x00 delimiter, the actual SCI-link octets
raw: 5a41000000880002000000000015cd5b07d7110000d61100000700000000000000ebb6cc08010000000900000000000000030000001027000068100000841c000040060000840300002800bccc5b0700000000000000000300000016000400d20400000300000030c80700006cdc02010000000000000002000000e835000084cb000006000000010000000300000046ed85ce
wire: 035a41010102880202010101010715cd5b07d7110103d61101020701010101010106ebb6cc08010101020901010101010102030101031027010368100103841c010340060103840301022805bccc5b0701010101010101020301010216020403d20401020301010430c80701056cdc02010101010101010202010103e835010384cb010206010102010101020301010546ed85ce00
